title: Post-breast surgery follow-up
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

follow_up.text: Defines the postoperative surgical-wound population and supports wound dressing, cleansing, wound-healing, and structured postoperative wound-care documentation.
follow_up.rationale: Supports postoperative wound and healing documentation for post-breast surgery follow-up; no decision is generated.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Defines the postoperative surgical-wound population and supports wound dressing, cleansing, wound-healing, and structured postoperative wound-care documentation.

source.title: Surgical site infections: prevention and treatment — Recommendations

follow_up.text: Supports review of suspected infection, cellulitis, microbiology context, structured wound care, and local heat, redness, pain, swelling, discharge, separation, abscess, fever, or systemic signs.
follow_up.rationale: Supports wound infection-sign review for post-breast surgery follow-up; no decision is generated.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports review of suspected infection, cellulitis, microbiology context, structured wound care, and local heat, redness, pain, swelling, discharge, separation, abscess, fever, or systemic signs.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Operation, laterality, pathology, margins, nodes, drains, seroma, lymphoedema, shoulder function, adjuvant plan, surveillance and follow-up remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for post-breast surgery follow-up.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
